_accountsHelp: Map each in-game BattleTag (Name#1234) to the Account select value in Notion. Fill in your real BattleTags. Name-only fallback (without #1234) is also matched case-insensitively.
_mapAliasesHelp: Optional overrides when the in-game map name from GEP differs from the page Name in your Notion Maps DB. Left side = GEP name, right side = Notion Maps page Name.
